summary: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 as its most capable frontier model with native computer-use, 1M token context, and GPT-5.4 Thinking/Pro variants. GitHub Copilot integrates GPT-5.4 immediately. Pentagon-Anthropic dispute escalates. Speechmatics achieves bilingual Arabic-English voice AI.

highlights.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 — Frontier Model With Computer-Use
highlights.summary: GPT-5.4 released March 5 as OpenAI's most capable model. Native computer-use (75% OSWorld vs 47.3% GPT-5.2), 1M token API context, 33% fewer factual errors. Available as GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro.
highlights.relevance: Competitive baseline update — GPT-5.4 replaces GPT-5.2 as OpenAI frontier. Native computer-use and agentic workflows directly compete with our voice AI agent capabilities.

highlights.title: GPT-5.4 Available in GitHub Copilot
highlights.summary: GPT-5.4 rolling out across VS Code, JetBrains, Xcode, and Eclipse for Copilot Pro, Business, and Enterprise users. Enhanced agentic coding and multi-step task execution.
highlights.relevance: Developer tooling shift — GPT-5.4 in Copilot raises the bar for AI-assisted coding. Compare against Claude Code for our workflow.

highlights.title: Pentagon-Anthropic Dispute Escalates Over AI Access
highlights.summary: Ongoing standoff between Pentagon and Anthropic over unrestricted military AI use. OpenAI positioned as alternative for classified network deployment after Anthropic refused to drop safety guardrails.
highlights.relevance: Strategic context — Anthropic's principled stance costs government contracts while OpenAI captures defense market.

tech_research.title: GPT-5.4 Benchmark Results — Record Scores Across Professional Tasks
tech_research.summary: 83% on GDPval knowledge work test across 44 occupations. 57.7% on SWE-Bench Pro for coding. 75% on OSWorld-Verified for computer-use (surpasses human benchmark of 72.4%). 67.3% on WebArena-Verified for browser tasks.
tech_research.relevance: Benchmark reference for comparing against Claude Opus 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro in our stack evaluations.

tech_research.title: GPT-5.4 Token Efficiency and Reduced Hallucinations
tech_research.summary: Individual claims 33% less likely to be false vs GPT-5.2. Full responses 18% less error-prone. Significantly fewer tokens to solve same problems. New Tool Search system for API tool calling.
tech_research.relevance: Reduced hallucination rates relevant to Bastion adversarial testing — may need updated attack vectors for more robust models.

tech_research.title: OpenAI ChatGPT Loses 1.5M Users After DoD Decision
tech_research.summary: OpenAI reportedly lost approximately 1.5 million users following its announcement to offer services to the Department of Defense. Internal employees openly opposed the decision.
tech_research.relevance: Market dynamics — user backlash to military AI partnerships affects enterprise sales positioning. Opportunity for Anthropic-aligned consultancies.

tech_research.title: Speechmatics Achieves Bilingual Arabic-English Voice AI
tech_research.summary: Speechmatics launches first commercial-grade bilingual Arabic-English speech-to-text model with 35% fewer errors than nearest competitor. Addresses dialect mixing in Middle Eastern markets.
tech_research.relevance: Directly competes with Sera's Gulf market voice AI focus. Bilingual Arabic-English capability is exactly what Gulf clients need.

tech_research.title: Lio Raises $30M for AI-Powered Procurement Agents
tech_research.summary: AI procurement startup Lio announced a $30 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz. Automates enterprise procurement workflows, achieving 75% task automation within six months.
tech_research.relevance: AI procurement automation trend — validates enterprise demand for AI agents in business workflows.

tech_research.title: DiligenceSquared Uses Voice AI Agents for M&A Research
tech_research.summary: Startup uses AI voice agents to conduct customer interviews for private equity due diligence, replacing expensive management consultants.
tech_research.relevance: Validates commercial demand for voice agent workflows in enterprise. Direct parallel to Sera's capabilities.

events.title: ALL IN 2026 — Canada's Largest AI Conference
events.summary: Canada's premier AI event bringing together researchers, startups, and enterprise leaders.
events.relevance: Major Canadian AI networking event. Speaking and lead gen opportunity.

events.title: ODSC AI East 2026 — Boston
events.summary: Open Data Science Conference with 3,500+ data practitioners. Sessions on LLMs, ML, Generative AI.
events.relevance: East Coast AI conference. Lead gen for enterprise clients.

events.title: AI Week 2026 | Montréal International
events.summary: Premier week-long event bringing together executives and thought leaders from government, technology, and education.
events.relevance: Key Montreal AI event for networking and lead generation.

events.title: E-AI 2026 | Montréal International
events.summary: Hands-on creative lab under the theme ‘Rolling Up Our Sleeves.’
events.relevance: Interactive AI event for practical applications.

events.title: DémultiplIA | IVADO
events.summary: Applications for the 2026 cohort are closed.
events.relevance: Flagship program for Quebec AI startups.

events.title: DémultiplIA 2026: 14 Quebec companies powered by AI | IVADO
events.summary: IVADO's flagship program supporting SMEs and startups in AI R&D.

events.title: IVADO Opens Applications for DémultiplIA 2026
events.summary: Applications open September 15–October 26, 2025; program begins early 2026.
events.relevance: Opportunity for AI startups to join the program.

business_opportunities.title: Lio Raises $30M — AI Procurement Automation Growing
business_opportunities.summary: Andreessen Horowitz leads $30M Series A for AI procurement startup. Signals strong enterprise demand for AI agent automation.
business_opportunities.relevance: Growing AI procurement market validates our enterprise agent positioning.

research_montreal.name: Mirco Ravanelli
research_montreal.title: Assistant Professor, Concordia | Mila
research_montreal.research: Creator of SpeechBrain, open-source voice AI toolkit. Directly relevant to TonalityIQ voice feature extraction and student pipeline.
research_montreal.relevance: SpeechBrain collaboration opportunity for voice AI R&D.

research_montreal.name: Manuel Morales
research_montreal.title: Associate Professor, UdeM | Director, Fin-ML (IVADO)
research_montreal.research: ML for finance, options pricing, risk models. Industry partnership coordinator at Fin-ML.
research_montreal.relevance: EventHorizonIQ data pipeline optimizations. IVADO grants for student interns.
